[PDF_PAGE 3 | score=8] How To Use DRAGONLANCEﬁ L AIRS DRAGONLANCE® Lairs is intended to provide the referee with a series of pregenerated encounters to insert into any DRAGONLANCE game campaign or adventure set in the world of Krynn. The referee may use these encounters without much prepara- tion to start an adventure or to spice up slow spots during the middle of a game or campaign. The adventures in the book are designed to cover a broad range of PC party levels from low (1-4) to high (9+), and most assume that there will be approximately six characters in the group. To use the DRAGONLANCE Lairs book to its fullest, you will need the DRAGONLANCE Adven- tures campaign book, which details the continent of Ansalon,
